title: Colymbada salonitana
taxonomy: Colymbada salonitana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Colymbada, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Hieracium. The plant is native to Europe and is a rare species. Colymbada salonitana is typically found in dry, rocky areas and is often associated with limestone and dolomite substrates. It is a relatively small plant, growing to a height of around 10-30 centimeters.
